Kansas Final Paycheck Law 2026
Deadlines, what must be included, and how to claim if your Kansas employer pays late.
If you were terminated
Next regular payday
If you resigned
Next regular payday
How to audit a Kansas final paycheck
Kansas's final-paycheck rule is a timing rule first and a documentation issue second. The same deadline applies whether the worker was terminated or resigned: next regular payday. That makes the separation date, the reason employment ended, and the next regular payda...
